rationale: No new developments affecting Romania's security or economy this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty continues to weigh on energy costs indirectly.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy price uncertainty alive, with indirect effects on Romanian household energy costs and inflation.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — no qualitative change
top_events.summary: War near Romania's border persists as background; no new escalation or Black Sea incident reported this cycle.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global risk sentiment; minor indirect signal for Romanian savings and investment environment.
